title: Senior People Data Analyst (Bangkok Based, relocation provided)
description: About AgodaAt Agoda, we bridge the world through travel. Our story began in 2005, when two lifelong friends and entrepreneurs, driven by their passion for travel, launched Agoda to make it easier for everyone to explore the world.Today, we are part of Booking Holdings [NASDAQ: BKNG], with a diverse team of over 7,000 people from 90 countries, working together in offices around the globe. Every day, we connect people to destinations and experiences, with our great deals across our millions of hotels and holiday properties, flights, and experiences worldwide.No two days are the same at Agoda. Data and technology are at the heart of our culture, fueling our curiosity and innovation. If you’re ready to begin your best journey and help build travel for the world, join us.Get To Know Our TeamThe People Team is a purveyor of opportunity, searching the globe for the most talented individuals and offering them an open, collaborative workplace. By prioritizing skill and potential, we have cultivated a powerful assembly of professionals through our drive for equal opportunity and diversity. We make the move to Agoda a breeze with assisted onboarding programs, and we continue to support and enrich our thousands of Agoda employees through individual growth with outstanding learning programs and various means of assistance. Our development of incredible benefits has ensured everyone can stay strong, healthy, and happy during their time at Agoda. Leading ambitious changes and making a positive impact in the lives of our employees, the People Team is a crucial and rewarding part of the Agoda family.The OpportunityThe Senior People Data Analyst will contribute to the People Planning & Analytics organizations’ success by providing pro-active analysis around People data, working with People Team and other Business stakeholders to identify patterns and provide actionable recommendations. As part of the organization, you’ll be working actively on budgeting activities and process and progressive improvement of the tools and processes of the team. This role collaborates closely with Finance and People team stakeholders to ensure activities are aligned with Agoda’s strategic goals and Personnel budget. The rapid growth of the business and the increasing complexity driven by new launches and services make this an exciting, and challenging proposition.In this Role you'll get, Add immediate value to the organization by delivering insightful analysis, dashboards and presentations to business & leadership about People data (recruitment, attrition, performance) to support long-term strategic decision makingGet involved in the operational Budgeting and Workforce planning of the companyProvide financial analysis & commentary on month-end financials & KPIs/OKRsBe a trusted advisor to Business Partners across the organizationEnhance the understanding and key levers of the Agoda business What You'll Need To SucceedBachelor’s degree required3-5 years of experience as Data analyst, preferably in an HR environment2-3 years of practical experience with MSSQL (or equivalent database), Tableau visualizationHigh level of discretion, confidentiality and ethicsAbility to work well with employees in a highly multi-cultural environmentStrong attention to detail and accuracySelf-starter with ability to work independently, while also collaborating with cross-functional teamsOwnership mindset and ability to meet tight deadlines with a logical, methodical approach to prioritizing tasks and responsibilitiesGreat if you haveExperience with OneStream softwareWorkforce planning and Budgeting experienceCommercial awareness, ability to think both analytically and strategically, to identify about underlying business issuesWillingness to challenge the status quo and propose improvements in existing processesCuriosity and willingness to get involved in the business to understand the story behind the numbers#STRA#ANLS#MRKT#3 #sanfrancisco #sanjose #losangeles #sandiego We prioritize attracting diverse talent and cultivating an inclusive environment that encourages collaboration and innovation. Employment at Agoda is based solely on a person’s merit and qualifications. We are committed to providing equal employment opportunity regardless of sex, age, race, color, national origin, religion, marital status, pregnancy, sexual orientation, gender identity, disability, citizenship, veteran or military status, and other legally protected characteristics.We will keep your application on file so that we can consider you for future vacancies and you can always ask to have your details removed from the file. For more details please read our privacy policy.DisclaimerWe do not accept any terms or conditions, nor do we recognize any agency’s representation of a candidate, from unsolicited third-party or agency submissions. If we receive unsolicited or speculative CVs, we reserve the right to contact and hire the candidate directly without any obligation to pay a recruitment fee.
